hooks.command: PROJECT_DIR="$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR"; REGISTRY="$PROJECT_DIR/logs/innovation-registry.md"; detected=0; [ -f "$REGISTRY" ] && detected=$(grep -c '| detected |' "$REGISTRY" 2>/dev/null || echo 0); if [ "$detected" -gt 0 ]; then echo "{\"systemMessage\":\"$detected innovation(s) pending triage. Run /wrap-session before ending to log this session and triage innovations.\"}"; else echo '{"systemMessage":"Consider running /wrap-session before ending to log this session."}'; fi
